subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Thy petition hath reached Us. The servant, present before the Countenance, hath laid it bare with utmost brevity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم عریضه ات رسید عبد حاضر تلقاء وجه عرض نمود بسیار مختصر و بلسان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement
